overall.description: A third-person perspective walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, following a character in a red jacket through neon-lit streets, under overpasses, and across busy intersections. The footage showcases high-end game engine graphics with dense urban architecture, digital billboards, and atmospheric lighting typical of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian sidewalk with modern glass architecture and water features

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, following a pedestrian in a red jacket ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows
long narrow pool with purple and blue lighting along the building base
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide pedestrian sidewalk lined with palm trees and modern glass buildings. The character follows another pedestrian while neon-lit skyscrapers rise in the background, and an illuminated water feature runs along the right side of the path.

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath overpass, transitioning from open neon-lit street to darker sheltered space

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass through the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: stationary dark station wagon parked under the overpass ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a roof over the walkway
continuous blue LED lighting along the base of the building wall

segments.scene_description: Moving into a covered walkway beneath a massive overpass structure. The environment becomes darker with artificial lighting from neon strips along the walls, and a parked station wagon becomes visible ahead in the sheltered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: service alley with dumpsters and digital advertising barriers

events.description: passes the parked station wagon on the right side while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow service alley, passing the parked vehicle on the right

notable_agents.action: parked station wagon being passed on the right side of the path

entered.detail: translucent digital screens displaying colorful advertisements lining the path
large black industrial waste containers with yellow bases arranged in rows

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow service alley lined with industrial dumpsters on the left and illuminated digital advertising barriers on the right. The character passes the parked vehicle and navigates the confined space between the waste containers and the building wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with crosswalks and moving traffic

events.description: exits the narrow alley and emerges into the open intersection with full sky visibility
crosses the wide intersection while futuristic vehicles drive through the crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, navigating through traffic and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic green sedan driving through the intersection
pedestrian in light clothing crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing marked with yellow stripes
towering high-rise buildings covered in digital displays and neon lighting
large vertical digital advertisement screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley into a vast open intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The character crosses the wide street marked with yellow crosswalk stripes while futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection and other pedestrians navigate the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a polished pedestrian promenade into the gritty underbelly of the city before emerging into a sprawling neon intersection. It begins on a wide sidewalk lined with palm trees and glass buildings, gliding past an illuminated water feature toward a towering skyline. As the camera moves forward, the open air gives way to the oppressive shadow of a massive overpass, where the lighting shifts to artificial neon strips and a parked station wagon appears in the sheltered space. The path then narrows into a confined service alley, squeezing between industrial dumpsters and digital advertising barriers before finally breaking open into a vast urban crossing. The scene culminates in a wide view of towering skyscrapers and futuristic vehicles as the character navigates yellow crosswalk stripes under a canopy of glowing advertisements.
